Information.Description: PF-06409577 is a chloroindole that is 6-chloro-1H-indole substituted by carboxy and 4-(1-hydroxycyclobutyl)phenyl groups at positions 3 and 5, respectively. It is a potent and selective allosteric activator of AMPK and a potential treatment for diabetic nephropathy. It has a role as an antiatherosclerotic agent, an antineoplastic agent, a nephroprotective agent and an EC 2.7.11.31 {[hydroxymethylglutaryl-CoA reductase (NADPH)] kinase} activator. It is a member of cyclobutanes, a member of benzenes, a tertiary alcohol, an indolecarboxylic acid and a chloroindole.
